name: std-hr-portal
description: HR portal: employees, onboarding wizard, time-off calendar, org chart. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + storage.

emits.description: Fired when the BrowseItem collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the (possibly paginated) slice and totalCount holds the unsliced filter total. totalCount is optional so compiled-path emitters that haven't been migrated yet still validate
Fired when the BrowseItem collection fails to load

effects.subject: Welcome to the team
effects.body: Welcome aboard! Your manager and equipment have been set up.

children.content: The new employee has been fully onboarded.

emits.description: Fired when CalendarEvent finishes loading; payload.data holds the events
Fired when CalendarEvent fails to load

effects.subject: Time-off @payload.data.status
